ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Central) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team in the season */,
  "win_loss_percentage" REAL /* Win-loss percentage for the team in the season */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team made the playoffs */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "playoff_win_loss_percentage" REAL /* Playoff win-loss percentage */,
  "final_standing" TEXT /* Final standing in the regular season (e.g., 1st in Eastern Conference) */,
  "playoff_final_standing" TEXT /* Final standing in the playoffs (e.g., Champion, 2nd Round) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical metric */,
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points scored per game for the team in the season */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Points allowed per game for the team in the season */,
  "strength_of_schedule_rating" REAL /* Strength of schedule rating for the team in the season */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game for the team in the season */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game for the team in the season */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game for the team in the season */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game for the team in the season */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers per game for the team in the season */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage for the team in the season */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage for the team in the season */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage for the team in the season */,
  "offensive_rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Offensive rebounds per game for the team in the season */,
  "defensive_rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Defensive rebounds per game for the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the game */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Points allowed by the team in the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_size" TEXT /* Size of the exported data */,
  "export_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the export process in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
